author: matkt0
content:
it seems also there is an inconsistency regarding the unknown block case

name: eth_getBlockAccessList
  summary: Returns the block access list for a given block.
  description: >-
    Returns the EIP-7928 block access list of the given block, decoded into JSON.
    Every account entry contains all six fields, with empty change lists encoded
    as empty arrays, and entries follow the ordering of the canonical RLP
    encoding. The result is null if the block is unknown or the pending tag
    is requested. For blocks that predate the Amsterdam fork clients MUST return
    the -32001: Resource not found error, and for blocks whose access list has
    been pruned clients MUST return the 4444: Pruned history unavailable error.

vs

name: debug_getRawBlockAccessList
  summary: Returns the RLP-encoded EIP-7928 block access list for a given block.
  description: >-
    Returns the EIP-7928 block access list of the given block as raw RLP-encoded
    bytes. A block with no state accesses returns the empty RLP list 0xc0.
    For unknown blocks and for blocks that predate the Amsterdam fork clients
    MUST return the -32001: Resource not found error, and for blocks whose
    access list has been pruned clients MUST return the
    4444: Pruned history unavailable error.
